final_answer: The action may proceed. The closeout ledger CLOSE-RAV-072 precisely matches the invoice INV-RAV-072, confirming all required conditions including the USD 51600 amount, tax review, quality signoff, and payment release approval. This satisfies the policy STD-RAV-072-P, allowing the invoice release despite the visible ERP hold. The source boundary is considered closed.
